meta.project: Silver Wings Defence — Tactical Web Portal

product_overview: A dark‑themed B2B web portal that markets autonomous drone/UAV systems and defense services, with an animated homepage, product catalog, secure contact flow, and client authentication views. The site prioritizes discoverability of product specs, partner contact, and operative onboarding.
core_goals: Discover and browse the full catalog of tactical drone/UAV products and view each product's specifications and analysis.
Access company information, services, and news to evaluate capabilities and partnerships.
Establish secure contact and request proposals via an encrypted contact form and partner portal link.
Initiate operative onboarding by submitting a registration request and access the client login gateway for authorized users.
Find and review career opportunities and tactical division job listings.

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Persistent top navigation that lets visitors move between primary pages and access the client login gateway, with a mobile overlay menu for small screens.
user_flows: Visit / -> Observe fixed NavBar at top -> Click logo to navigate to / -> Click About link to navigate to /about-us -> Click Products link to navigate to /products
Visit / on mobile -> Open hamburger menu -> Click Contact link in overlay to navigate to /contact -> Confirm overlay closes

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Animated hero that introduces the brand with a three-line word reveal, parallax background, and two CTA actions to engage visitors.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View animated hero text (Precision / Protection / Power) -> Scroll to trigger hero fade-out parallax
Navigate to / -> View hero -> Click Request Proposal button (visual CTA) -> Observe CTA interaction feedback

features.name: Horizontal Scroll Cards (Core Solutions)
features.description: Three horizontally scrollable solution cards (Unmanned Systems, Global Surveillance, Cyber Security) that respond to drag/swipe and hover.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to Core Solutions section -> Mouse drag or touch swipe to scroll the horizontal cards -> Hover a solution card -> See image opacity change

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Responsive grid presenting all 11 products with terminal-style tooltips on hover and CTA to view acquisition flow from the catalog.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> View all 11 products in responsive grid -> Hover over a product card -> See terminal tooltip with specs
Navigate to /products -> Hover over a product's ACQUIRE SYSTEM CTA -> See tooltip switch to red alert mode -> Select a product from the catalog to view its details

features.name: Product Detail View
features.description: Detailed tactical page per product that presents system ID, RESTRICTED badge, specifications table, terminal analysis, and acquisition actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Select a product from the catalog to view details -> View product name, system ID and RESTRICTED badge -> View tactical specifications table
Navigate to /products -> Select a product from the catalog to view details -> Click ABORT AND RETURN to go back to /products

features.name: Contact Form (Encrypted)
features.description: Encrypted five-field contact form for partners and operatives with a Partner Portal access link to the client login gateway.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill in Operative Name -> Fill in Sur/Code Name -> Fill in Organization/Agency -> Select Security Clearance level from dropdown -> Fill in Encrypted Payload textarea -> Click TRANSMIT button to submit (client-side)
Navigate to /contact -> In Partner Portal section click AUTHORIZE ACCESS -> Navigate to /login

features.name: Client Login (Command Gateway)
features.description: Operative authentication UI to enter ID and passphrase, toggle session persistence, and navigate to recovery or registration flows.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> View status ticker bar showing security info -> Fill in Operative ID / Clearance Code field -> Fill in Security Passphrase field -> Check Remember Terminal Session checkbox -> Click AUTHORIZE ACCESS button
Navigate to /login -> Click RESET CLEARANCE? link to go to /forgot-password -> Click INITIATE CLEARANCE REQUEST link to go to /signup

features.name: Operative Registration (Signup)
features.description: Six-field registration form for requesting an operative ID and clearance level with client-side required validation on key fields.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in Operative Name -> Fill in Requested ID -> Fill in Affiliation / Agency -> Select Clearance Level from dropdown -> Fill in Security Passphrase -> Fill in Verify Passphrase -> Click SUBMIT CLEARANCE REQUEST button

Navigate to /signup -> Fill all fields but enter mismatched Verify Passphrase -> See client-side validation indicating mismatch -> Correct Verify Passphrase -> Click SUBMIT CLEARANCE REQUEST button -> Click RETURN TO COMMAND GATEWAY to go to /login

features.name: Forgot Password / Clearance Reset
features.description: Single-field clearance reset form that accepts an email/operative ID and provides a client-side submission action to request a reset.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill in email/operative ID field with a valid email format -> Click TRANSMIT RESET CODE button
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill in email/operative ID field with invalid format -> See client-side validation error -> Correct email and click TRANSMIT RESET CODE

features.name: Career Page
features.description: Recruitment page showcasing infrastructure, tactical divisions, and terminal job listings that reveal additional actions on hover.
user_flows: Navigate to /career -> View hero heading and CTA button -> View three infrastructure feature cards and four tactical division cards
Navigate to /career -> Hover over a job listing -> Reveal INITIATE UPLOAD text

features.name: About Us Page
features.description: Company story and leadership section with doctrine bento grid, stats, and technical specs CTA to surface corporate credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /about-us -> View animated hero heading and stats (2010, 40+ patents) -> View CORE DOCTRINE cards (Mission, Vision, Values) -> Click View Technical Specs button
Navigate to /about-us -> Observe rotating ring animations behind imagery

features.name: Services and News
features.description: Informational pages that present service offerings and press content to help buyers evaluate capabilities and announcements.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> View service cards and imagery
Navigate to /news -> View listed news articles or press releases and article images

features.name: Footer
features.description: Global footer with brand, copyright, and quick links that appear on all pages.
user_flows: Visit any static page such as / -> Scroll to page bottom -> View SILVER WINGS DEFENCE branding and copyright text
Visit / -> Hover over footer links and observe gold color change -> Click Partner Portal link (placeholder) and observe link action

routes.description: Homepage with hero, parallax, horizontal scroll cards, circular cards, drone assembly, partner logos and CTA
About Us page with company origins, core doctrine bento grid, and leadership section
Services page listing defense service offerings with imagery
Product catalog grid showing all 11 drone/UAV products
Individual product detail page with specs and acquisition CTA
Career page with Active Directives job listings and tactical division info
Encrypted contact form with partner portal access link
Client login page - Command Gateway with operative ID and passphrase fields
Clearance reset page with email input

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Fixed top navigation bar with brand logo, page links, and CLIENT LOGIN button
user_interactions: Click logo to navigate to homepage
Click nav links (Home, About, Services, Products, News, Career, Contact) to navigate
Click CLIENT LOGIN button to go to /login
On mobile, click hamburger icon to open full-screen overlay menu
Click links in mobile menu to navigate and close overlay

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Animated hero section with parallax background, 3-line stacked heading, two CTA buttons, and a tactical status card
user_interactions: View animated hero text (Precision / Protection / Power)
Click Request Proposal button
Click Explore Solutions button
Scroll to trigger hero fade-out parallax

features.name: Horizontal Scroll Cards
features.description: Section with 3 horizontally scrollable solution cards (Unmanned Systems, Global Surveillance, Cyber Security)
user_interactions: Mouse drag to scroll cards horizontally
Hover on cards to see image opacity change

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Grid of 11 drone/UAV product cards with hover terminal tooltip
user_interactions: View all 11 products in responsive grid
Hover over product card to see terminal tooltip with specs
Hover over ACQUIRE SYSTEM button to trigger red alert tooltip mode
Click ACQUIRE SYSTEM button to navigate to /products/[id]

features.name: Product Detail View
features.description: Detailed product page with tactical specs, terminal analysis, and confirm acquisition CTA
user_interactions: View product name, system ID, RESTRICTED badge
View tactical specifications table
View terminal system analysis block
Click ABORT AND RETURN to go back to /products
Click CONFIRM ACQUISITION button

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Encrypted contact form with 5 fields and Partner Portal access link
user_interactions: Fill in Operative Name text field
Fill in Sur/Code Name text field
Fill in Organization/Agency text field
Select Security Clearance level from dropdown
Fill in Encrypted Payload textarea
Click TRANSMIT button to submit
Click AUTHORIZE ACCESS in Partner Portal section to navigate to /login

features.name: Client Login
features.description: Command Gateway authentication form with operative ID, passphrase, and remember session checkbox
user_interactions: View status ticker bar showing security info
Fill in Operative ID / Clearance Code field
Fill in Security Passphrase field
Check/uncheck Remember Terminal Session checkbox
Click AUTHORIZE ACCESS button
Click RESET CLEARANCE? link to go to /forgot-password
Click INITIATE CLEARANCE REQUEST to go to /signup

features.name: Operative Registration (Signup)
features.description: 6-field registration form for new operatives
user_interactions: Fill in Operative Name
Fill in Requested ID
Fill in Affiliation / Agency
Select Clearance Level from dropdown
Fill in Security Passphrase
Fill in Verify Passphrase
Click SUBMIT CLEARANCE REQUEST button
Click RETURN TO COMMAND GATEWAY to go to /login

features.name: Forgot Password / Clearance Reset
features.description: Single-field form for requesting a passphrase reset
user_interactions: Fill in email/operative ID field
Click TRANSMIT RESET CODE button
Click Return to Command Gateway link to go to /login

features.name: Career Page
features.description: Recruitment page with environment highlights, tactical divisions, and terminal job listings
user_interactions: View hero heading and CTA button
View 3 infrastructure feature cards
View 4 tactical division cards
Hover over job listings to reveal INITIATE UPLOAD text

features.name: About Us Page
features.description: Company origin story, core doctrine bento grid, and technology leadership section
user_interactions: View animated hero heading and stats (2010, 40+ patents)
View 3 core doctrine cards (Mission, Vision, Values)
View leadership technology section
Click View Technical Specs button

features.name: Footer
features.description: Site footer with brand name, copyright, and quick links
user_interactions: View brand name and copyright
Hover over footer links to see gold color change
Click footer links (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Careers, Download Brochures, Partner Portal)

known_limitations.issue: Login form has no backend authentication — button is type=button with no action
known_limitations.impact: Cannot test actual login success/failure states

known_limitations.issue: Signup form has no backend user creation
Forgot password form has no email dispatch API
Contact form TRANSMIT button has no API integration
known_limitations.impact: Form submission cannot be validated end-to-end
Footer link navigation cannot be fully tested

known_limitations.issue: Homepage Request Proposal and Explore Solutions buttons have no navigation
known_limitations.impact: CTA button functionality is visual only

known_limitations.issue: Product images all use same placeholder Google image URL
known_limitations.impact: Cannot differentiate products visually by image

known_limitations.issue: Product specs all show TBD placeholder data
known_limitations.impact: Spec content cannot be validated against real data
